---
name: ✨ Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for this project
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Feature Description
<!-- A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see -->

## Problem This Solves
<!-- Is there a specific problem this feature would solve? -->
<!-- Example: "I'm always frustrated when..." -->

## Proposed Solution
<!-- Describe what you want to happen -->

## Alternative Solutions
<!-- Have you considered any alternatives? -->

## User Impact
<!-- How many users would this benefit? -->
- [ ] All users
- [ ] Most users
- [ ] Some users (admins, technicians, etc.)
- [ ] Specific use case: ___________

## Priority
<!-- How important is this to you? -->
- [ ] **Must have** - I can't use the app without this
- [ ] **Should have** - Important but not critical
- [ ] **Nice to have** - Would improve experience
- [ ] **Future idea** - Long-term vision

## Mockups / Examples
<!-- If applicable, add mockups, screenshots, or examples from other apps -->

## Technical Notes
<!-- Optional: Any technical details or implementation suggestions -->

## Additional Context
<!-- Add any other context, links, or resources about the feature request -->
